name: Cape Cod Fish Chowder#2
recipeIngredient: freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the Haddock in 2 cups of water for 15 minutes. Drain off and reserve the broth.
2. Remove the skin and bones from the fish.
3. Sauté the diced salt pork in a large pot until crisp. Remove the salt pork.
4. Sauté the onions in the pork fat until golden brown.
5. Add the fish, celery, potatoes, and bay leaf to the pot.
6. Measure the reserved fish broth and add enough boiling water to make 3 cups liquid.
7. Simmer for 30 minutes. Add milk and butter, then simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until well heated.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Makes 8 servings.
